evidence: standards/enterprise/performance-resilience.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: A retry-policy exception records the exact operation/error, idempotency risk, attempt/time bound, owner, approval, expiry, and remediation plan; unbounded or non-cancellable retry is never permitted.
statement: Automatic retries MUST classify idempotency, restrict eligible failures, bound attempts and elapsed time, support cancellation, apply backoff and jitter where appropriate, and expose one terminal outcome.
